preamble: The spirantization of a voiced retroflex stop [ɖ] into a voiced retroflex fricative [ʐ]. This voiced lenition process is parallel to the voiceless spirantization of [ʈ].

examples.note: Hypothesized stage in the development of the Mandarin retroflex series from earlier voiced stops.

sources: Pulleyblank, E. G. (1984). Middle Chinese: A Study in Historical Phonology.
